zh.lifeSummary: 當comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez於大約1236年出生在法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲時，他的父親Comte Hughes de Rodez37歲，母親Isabelle de Roquefeull27歲。他於1256年8月9日與Marquezia de Baux在法國迪瑟 德 馬爾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1303年12月在法國米迪-列內斯艾維倫加格斯享年68歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易波聶瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez于大约1236年出生在法国米迪-列內斯艾維倫羅德茲时，他的父亲Comte Hughes de Rodez37岁，母亲Isabelle de Roquefeull27岁。他于1256年8月9日与Marquezia de Baux在法国迪瑟 德 馬爾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1303年12月在法国米迪-列內斯艾維倫加格斯享年68岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯豪-洛易波聶瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Rodez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

variants.name: Rudes
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

en.lifeSummary: When comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez was born about 1236, in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, his father, Comte Hughes de Rodez, was 37 and his mother, Isabelle de Roquefeull, was 27. He married Marquezia de Baux on 9 August 1256, in Diocese of Marseille, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in December 1303, in Gages, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Bonneval, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez est né environ 1236, à Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, son père, Comte Hughes de Rodez, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Roquefeull, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Marquezia de Baux le 9 août 1256, à Diocèse de Marseille, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en décembre 1303, à Gages, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Bonneval, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez um 1236 in Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte Hughes de Rodez 37 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Roquefeull 27. Er hat am 9. August 1256 in Diocèse de Marseille, Frankreich Marquezia de Baux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Dezember 1303 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Gages, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Bonneval, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez è nato il circa 1236 nel Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, il suo padre, Comte Hughes de Rodez, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Roquefeull, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Marquezia de Baux il 9 agosto 1256, nel Diocèse de Marseille, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel dicembre 1303, nel Gages, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Bonneval, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodezが約1236年にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスエイビーロンロデズで生まれた時，父Comte Hughes de Rodezは37歳，母Isabelle de Roquefeullは27歳であった。1256年8月9日にフランスディオクeゼ ド マーセイルでMarquezia de Bauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1303年12月にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスエイビーロンガジェズで68歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスハウテ-ロイアーボネヴァルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez(이)가 대략 1236년 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 에비런 로데즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte Hughes de Rodez(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Roquefeull(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1256년 8월 9일 프랑스 디오ce스 데 마세이에서 Marquezia de Baux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1303년 12월 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 에비런 게이그스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 하테-로이르 보네발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez nasceu aproximadamente 1236, em Rodez, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, França, seu pai, Comte Hughes de Rodez, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Roquefeull, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Marquezia de Baux em 9 de agosto de 1256, em Diocèse de Marseille, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1303, em Gages, Aveyron, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Bonneval, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez родился около 1236 г. в местности родез, авирон, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte Hughes de Rodez было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Roquefeull, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Marquezia de Baux 9 августа 1256 г. в местности диокeс де марсилл, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер декабрь 1303 г. в местности гагесь, авирон, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности бонневаль, хауте-лоир, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando comte, vicomte, baron seigneur Henri de Rodez nació aproximadamente 1236, en Rodez, Aveyron, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, su papá, Comte Hughes de Rodez, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Roquefeull, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Marquezia de Baux el 9 de agosto de 1256, en Diocèse de Marseille, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en diciembre de 1303, en Gages, Aveyron, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Bonneval, Haute-Loire, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
